sections.content: Let me check W's position after DOWN.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check W position after DOWN
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'W' and min([p[0] for p in n['boundary']]) > 0:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"W: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        break

# Check red blocks
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'R':
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"R: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move W to target position: rows 32-46, cols 38-52
# Current: rows 14-28, cols 14-28

action(moves)
